docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SPEED, A. JONATHAN MEREDO, SILVIA AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-10-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS A. JONATHAN SPEED AND SILVIA MEREDO ARE PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORP. IS REPRESENTED BY COMMUNITY MANAGER, BREHYONNIA REEVES. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BREHYONNIA REEVES, MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPEED, A. JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-29-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
REMARK: PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED VIA MAIL.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPEED, A. JONATHAN
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPEED, A. JONATHAN

ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. A. JOHNATHAN SPEED
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. SILVIA MEREDO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPEED, A. JONATHAN MEREDO, SILVIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,585.00, PARTIES ENTERED INTO STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR AMOUNT STATED IN OPEN COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
